reasoning.research_depth: Deep evolutionary biology and geology tracing redwood evolution from Pangaea cypress ancestors through Laurasia fog adaptation to modern California remnants
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent narrative flow - each concept builds on previous, minimal tangents, personal framing adds engagement without diluting content
reasoning.originality: Novel angle connecting atmospheric moisture intake strategy to height evolution and positive feedback loops - goes well beyond standard ecology
reasoning.lasting_impact: Strong educational value about evolutionary adaptation, climate change effects on species, and biogeography principles

transcript_assessment: Representative science/geography deep-dive typical of Atlas Pro
